summary: Frontend testing for Online Store and Keyboard Shortcuts navigation modules completed. All 6 tests passed - both sidebar links are visible and properly integrated with the RBAC permissions system for superadmin user.
critical_code_review_comments: Online Store (ecommerce) link correctly placed in E-COMMERCE section of superadmin sidebar (line 693 in App.js)
Keyboard Shortcuts link correctly placed in Extra Features section of superadmin sidebar (line 765 in App.js)
Both links have proper data-testid attributes: nav-ecommerce, nav-keyboard-shortcuts
PermissionContext.js has correct PAGE_PERMISSION_MAP entries for ecommerce (line 98) and keyboard_shortcuts (line 94)
EcommercePage displays Dashboard tab with revenue/orders stats, Orders tab, B2B Customers tab, Inventory Sync tab, and SEO Blog tab
KeyboardShortcutsPage displays 20 shortcuts across 4 categories with search functionality
context_for_next_testing_agent: Online Store and Keyboard Shortcuts modules are properly integrated in sidebar navigation. Both pages load correctly with full functionality.

Online Store (ecommerce) link visible in.details: Link found in E-COMMERCE section with data-testid='nav-ecommerce', visible and clickable

Keyboard Shortcuts link visible in sideb.details: Link found in EXTRA FEATURES section with data-testid='nav-keyboard-shortcuts', visible and clickable

Clicking Online Store navigates to E-Com.details: E-Commerce page loads with data-testid='ecommerce-page', shows dashboard with revenue/orders stats

Clicking Keyboard Shortcuts navigates to.details: Keyboard Shortcuts page loads with data-testid='keyboard-shortcuts-page', shows shortcuts list

E-Commerce page displays dashboard with.details: Dashboard tab, Orders tab, B2B Customers tab, Inventory Sync tab, SEO Blog tab all present

Keyboard Shortcuts page displays shortcu.details: Shows 20 Total Shortcuts, 4 Categories, 10 Navigation shortcuts, 3 POS Shortcuts with search functionality
